mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM ) AS LINE_NO , A.BBS_ID , A.ORG_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.BBSNM , A.BBS_EXPLN , A.BBS_TYCD , A.BBS_BSC_LANG_CD , A.MENU_CD , A.MN_IMG_FILE_ID
, A.ATFL_USEYN , A.ATFL_MAX_CNT , A.ATFL_MAXSZ
, A.LIST_CNT
, A.DELYN
, A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM
, A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID AND UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL) AS ATCL_CNT , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND UP_CD = 'BBS_TYCD' AND CD = A.BBS_TYCD) AS BBS_TYPE_NM
, CASE WHEN A.BBS_REF_TYCD = 'TEAM' THEN B.TEAM_CTGRCD ELSE NULL END AS TEAM_TYCD , CASE WHEN A.BBS_REF_TYCD = 'TEAM' THEN A.BBS_REF_TYPE_ID ELSE NULL END AS TEAM_ID , CASE WHEN A.BBS_REF_TYCD = 'TEAM' THEN B.SBJCT_ID ELSE A.BBS_REF_TYPE_ID END AS SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TEAM_ID, SBJCT_ID, TEAM_CTGRCD FROM TB_LMS_TEAM) B ON B.TEAM_ID = A.BBS_REF_TYPE_ID AND A.BBS_REF_TYCD = 'TEAM' WHERE 1=1 AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.BBS_BSC_LANG_CD = #{langCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
AND ( LOWER(A.BBSNM) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{searchValue} || '%') OR LOWER(( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT JOIN TB_LMS_USER_PRFIL ON USER_ID = USER_PRFIL_ID WHERE USER_ACNT_ID = A.RGTR_ID )) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{searchValue} || '%') )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfo 설 명 : 게시판 목록 */
/* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfoPaging 설 명 : 게시판 목록 페이징 */

/* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfoCourseTab 설 명 : 게시판 강의실 탭 */
SELECT A.BBS_ID , A.BBS_ID , NVL(B.BBSNM, A.BBSNM) AS BBSNM , NVL(TOTAL.TOTAL_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_CNT , CASE WHEN A.BBS_ID IN ('QNA', 'SECRET') THEN NVL(NO_ANS.NO_ANSWER_ATCL_CNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS NO_ANSWER_ATCL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_INFO_LANG B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.LANG_CD = 'ko'
-- 🔹 게시글 총 건수 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AA.BBS_ID, COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL AA LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN BB ON AA.BBS_ID = BB.BBS_ID AND BB.CONTS_TYCD IN ('TEAM', 'COURSE') -- 필요 시 조정 WHERE AA.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND AA.DELYN = 'N'
AND ( AA.RSRV_USEYN = 'N' OR AA.RSRV_DTTM <= FN_DTTM() ) AND ( AA.LOCKYN = 'N' OR AA.RGTR_ID = #{viewerNo} ) AND ( A.BBS_ID != 'TEAM' OR ( A.BBS_ID = 'TEAM' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR WHERE TEAM_ID = BB.RLTN_REF_CD AND USER_ID = #{viewerNo} ) ) )
GROUP BY AA.BBS_ID ) TOTAL ON A.BBS_ID = TOTAL.BBS_ID
-- 🔹 미답변 게시글 건수 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AA.BBS_ID, COUNT(1) AS NO_ANSWER_ATCL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BB WHERE BB.BBS_ID = AA.BBS_ID AND BB.UP_ATCL_ID = AA.ATCL_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' )
AND ( AA.RSRV_USEYN = 'N' OR AA.RSRV_DTTM <= FN_DTTM() ) AND ( AA.LOCKYN = 'N' OR AA.RGTR_ID = #{viewerNo} )
GROUP BY AA.BBS_ID ) NO_ANS ON A.BBS_ID = NO_ANS.BBS_ID
WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
AND A.BBS_ID = 'TEAM' AND A.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN AA WHERE AA.CONTS_TYCD = 'TEAM' AND AA.RLTN_REF_CD IN ( SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM AAA WHERE AAA.TEAM_ID = AA.RLTN_REF_CD AND AAA.TEAM_TYCD IN ( SELECT TEAM_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR AAAA WHERE AAAA.TEAM_TYCD = AAA.TEAM_TYCD AND AAAA.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND AAAA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) ) )
AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsCd} AND A.SYS_USEYN = 'N' AND A.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN WHERE BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID AND CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' AND RLTN_REF_CD = #{crsCreCd} )

/* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfoCourseStudentTab 설 명 : 게시판 강의실 학생 강의공지 탭 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.GBN = 'COURSE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS LINE_NO , A.BBS_ID , A.BBS_ID , A.BBSNM FROM ( SELECT 'COURSE' AS GBN , A.BBS_ID , A.BBS_ID , NVL(C.BBSNM, A.BBSNM) AS BBSNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS A JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' AND B.RLTN_REF_CD = #{crsCreCd} LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_INFO_LANG C ON A.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND C.LANG_CD = #{langCd} WHERE A.SYS_USEYN = 'N' AND A.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.BBS_ID = 'NOTICE' AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} -- 전체공지 게시판 UNION ALL SELECT 'SYSTEM' AS GBN , A.BBS_ID , NULL AS BBS_ID , NVL(B.BBSNM, A.BBSNM) AS BBSNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_INFO_LANG B ON A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.LANG_CD = #{langCd} WHERE A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} ) A

/* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfoCouncelProf 설 명 : 게시판 상담교수 목록 */ SELECT C.USER_ID , C.USERNM , D.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN SBJCT_PROF B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON B.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR'

/* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfoDecls 설 명 : 게시판 분반 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ODR , A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ODR , A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN SBJCT_PROF B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND B.RPRSYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID JOIN ( SELECT A.CRS_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , B.USER_ID , C.CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN SBJCT_PROF B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND B.RPRSYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) D ON A.CRS_ID = D.CRS_ID AND C.CRS_SMSTR_ID = D.CRS_SMSTR_ID AND B.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND A.SBJCT_ID != D.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD != 'CLOSE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN AA JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BB ON AA.BBS_ID = BB.BBS_ID AND BB.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE AA.RLTN_REF_CD = A.SBJCT_ID AND AA.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' ) ) A ORDER BY A.ODR, A.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : BbsInfoDAO.listBbsInfoTeamCtgr 설 명 : 게시판 팀 카테고리 목록 */ SELECT A.TEAM_TYCD , A.TEAM_CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR A WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.TEAM_BBS_YN = 'Y' AND A.TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TEAM AA JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR BB ON AA.TEAM_ID = BB.TEAM_ID AND BB.USER_ID = #{userId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) WHERE AA.TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD )

/* SQL ID : BbsDAO.selectBbs 설 명 : 게시판 정보 조회 */ SELECT BBS_ID , ORG_ID , SBJCT_ID , BBS_REF_TYPE_ID , BBS_REF_TYCD , BBSNM , BBS_ENNM , BBS_EXPLN , BBS_TYCD , BBS_LANG_CD , MENU_ID , MN_IMG_FILE_ID , LIST_CNT , ATFL_MAX_CNT , ATFL_MAXSZ , ATFL_USEYN , DELYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , USEYN FROM TB_LMS_BBS WHERE 1=1 AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : BbsAtclDAO.bbsInfoRegist 설 명 : 게시판 정보 저장 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_BBS ( BBS_ID , ORG_ID , SBJCT_ID , BBS_REF_TYPE_ID , BBS_REF_TYCD , BBSNM , BBS_ENNM , BBS_EXPLN , BBS_TYCD , BBS_LANG_CD , MENU_ID , MN_IMG_FILE_ID , LIST_CNT , ATFL_MAX_CNT , ATFL_MAXSZ , ATFL_USEYN , DELYN , USEYN , BBS_ADDYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{bbsId} , #{orgId} , #{sbjctId} , NULL , NULL , #{bbsNm} , #{bbsEnnm} , #{bbsExpln} , #{bbsTycd} , #{langCd} , 'MENU_BBS_01' , NULL , 20 , 10 , 100 , 'Y' , 'N' , 'Y' , 'N' , #{userId} , FN_DTTM() )
